title: SHERWOOD Ironing Board Cover, 100% Cotton Cover with Thick Felt (Bubble, 124 x 38cm)
features: SIZE: Fit ironing board up to 124x38cm. The elasticized edges create the look of a custom cover. Please note that the ironing board is not included with the cover.

QUALITY MATERIAL: Adopt high quality and durable 100% cotton with scorch and stain resistant finish as cover. More durable and long lasting. Durable and thick fabric lining will maintain a flat shape during ironing. It can prevents scorching, burning, and staining while your iron to glide smoothly on the surface.

PERFECT NON-SLIP FIT: Elasticized edges design fits the board perfectly, and pull elastic cord firmly. Slipping and the exposure of the edges will be prevented by this. It has 2 underside hook and loop fastener straps for additional protection. Fasten to the back of the ironing board to keep it in place for better and more efficient Ironing. So you achieve perfect and wrinkle free clothes in a fraction of time.

PRACTICAL & BEAUTIFUL: The ironing board cover reflects the heat and steam evenly on both sides to remove wrinkles, folds, and creases faster. The ironing board cover with creative patterns not only makes the usually mundane act of ironing more fun, but also redecorates tired looking boards in an instant.

HELPS KEEP YOUR CLOTHES LOOKING NEW: Ironing is a tedious and meticulous chore that needs to be done properly. Our ironing board cover can protect your clothes and achieve perfect professional results everytime! Our ironing board cover is designed to make ironing faster and less strenuous so that you'll never worry about leaving the house wearing wrinkled clothes again.
